---
title: "Variant"
description: "Base class of all decoded-to-codegen Daml variants with no type parameters. Its encoded counterpart is Variant, which can be produced with toValue()."
---

**Signature**

```text
public abstract class Variant<T> extends Object implements DefinedDataType<T>
```
